titleStmt.title: SII 23.482: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 482. (A.R. No. 482 of 1907.) Kuttālam, Mayuram Taluk, Tanjavur District Ōṅkārēśvara temple—on the north wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine Kulōttuṅga III: year 25: 1203 A.D.

summary.p: The inscription begins with the same preamble giving only the beginning words of the introduction Puyalvāyttu maṇ vaḷara like Nos. 479 and 480 above, and ending with the appellation ‘who took Madurai, Īḻam and the crowned head of the Pāṇḍya’. The details of date are given as Mīna, śu. 1, Sunday, [Rēvati] corresponding to A.D. 1203, March 16, Nak. ending ·84 the previous day. The record is incomplete and stops with the mention of some land belonging to Jayadharappallavaraiyar at Kāvirinallūr a dēvadāna village of god Śoṉṉavāṟāṟivār at Vīṅgunīrtturutti and which the ūravar (assembly) of the place made into an ūrkīḻ-iṟaiyili.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . puyal vāyttu maṇvaḷara Eṉṟa pāṭṭeḻuti tiripuvaṉaccakka ravattikaḷ maturaiyum Īḻamum pāṇṭiyaṉ muṭittalaiyuṅ koṇṭaru ḷiya śrīkulottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 25Āvatu miṉanāya ṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu prathamaiyum nāyaṟṟukkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa re vatināḷ jayaṅkoṇṭaco ttūr nāṭṭu viṅkunirtturutti Uṭaiyār coṉṉavāṟṟivār tevatāṉam kāviri nallūr Ūravaro m Innāṭṭuk kuṟṟālamuṭaiyāṉ brahmateyattuk kuṟṟālamuṭai
yār Arayaṉ Āḷuṭainakkaṉārāṉa jayadharappallavaraiyar Eḻuntaruḷuvitta Oṅkāriśvaramuṭaiyārkku Ikkoyil Āti caṇṭeśvarateva Ūrkkiḻ Iṟaiyiliyāka viṭṭa nilattukku pramāṇa Icaivu tiṭṭuk kuṭutta paricāvatu Innāyaṉārkkuk kāvirinallūr Ūrkkiḻ Innilam Iru māvarai yitil piḷḷai jayadharappallavaraiyar kāṇiyāṉa nilattu In nāyaṉārkku Ivar tirunāmattuk kāṇiyāka viṭṭa nilam OrumāStops here.
Digital edition of SII 23.482 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
